tasks.title: Extend GwrkConfigSchema with server config
tasks.description: In src/utils/config.ts, add server.port (number, 1024-65535) and server.host (string) fields to GwrkConfigSchema. No .default() calls. Export the extended type.

tasks.title: Add fastify dependency
tasks.description: Add 'fastify' to dependencies in package.json. Run pnpm install.

tasks.title: Create PID file manager
tasks.description: Create src/server/pid.ts with writePid(pidPath), readPid(pidPath), removePid(pidPath). writePid writes process.pid. readPid returns number|null, validates process is alive via kill(pid,0). removePid deletes the file (no-op if missing).

tasks.title: Create Fastify server bootstrap
tasks.description: Create src/server/index.ts with startServer(config: GwrkConfig) that: creates Fastify instance, registers GET /health (returns 200), writes PID file via writePid(), binds to config.server.host:config.server.port. Export stopServer(instance) that: waits 30s for active work, calls removePid(), closes Fastify. Register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers.

tasks.title: Create server CLI commands
tasks.description: Create src/commands/server.ts with Commander subcommands: 'gwrk server start' (calls startServer, checks existing PID, checks Docker availability) and 'gwrk server stop' (reads PID, sends SIGTERM, waits for exit, verifies port released).

tasks.title: Register server command in CLI
tasks.description: In src/cli.ts, import serverCommand from ./commands/server.js and add program.addCommand(serverCommand). Exclude 'server start' from preAction config validation if server.* fields are missing (server start implicitly validates).

tasks.title: Unit tests for Phase 1
tasks.description: Create src/commands/server.test.ts: verify start creates PID, binds port, /health returns 200; verify stop removes PID, releases port; verify start when already running shows error. Create src/server/index.test.ts: verify Fastify bootstrap and /health endpoint. Create src/server/pid.test.ts: verify write/read/remove PID lifecycle.

tasks.title: Extend GwrkConfigSchema with parallelism config
tasks.description: In src/utils/config.ts, add parallelism.local.maxClones (int, positive), parallelism.local.maxCpu (1-100), parallelism.local.maxMem (1-100), parallelism.local.minDiskGb (positive number), parallelism.cloud.maxConcurrent (int, positive) to GwrkConfigSchema. No .default() calls.

tasks.title: Create SystemMonitor class
tasks.description: Create src/server/monitor.ts with class SystemMonitor: constructor(config), sample() returns {cpuPercent, memPercent, diskFreeGb}, isThrottled() returns boolean (checks against config limits), startPolling(intervalMs) caches samples, stopPolling() clears interval, getStatus() returns full SystemStatus object.

tasks.title: Create /api/status route
tasks.description: Create src/server/routes/status.ts exporting a Fastify route plugin. GET /api/status calls monitor.getStatus() and returns SystemStatus JSON.

tasks.title: Create gwrk status CLI command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/status.ts with Commander command: 'gwrk status' queries http://localhost:<port>/api/status. If daemon is not running, return {server:{status:'stopped'}}. Support --json flag for raw JSON output.

tasks.title: Register status command in CLI
tasks.description: In src/cli.ts, import statusCommand from ./commands/status.js and add program.addCommand(statusCommand).

tasks.title: Unit tests for Phase 2
tasks.description: Create src/server/monitor.test.ts: verify sample() returns valid numbers, isThrottled() returns true when limits exceeded, polling starts/stops. Create src/server/routes/status.test.ts: verify /api/status returns correct SystemStatus shape.

tasks.title: Create shared server types
tasks.description: Create src/server/types.ts with Zod schemas and inferred types: DispatchRecord, DispatchAttempt, DispatchStatus, SystemStatus, SandboxInfo, AgentBackend (re-export from config). All validated with Zod, no .default() calls.

tasks.title: Create Git branch manager
tasks.description: Create src/server/git-manager.ts with: createPhaseBranch(feature, phase) creates phase/<feature>-<phase> from feature/<feature>-wip via child_process.execFile; mergePhaseBack(feature, phase) merges phase branch into feature branch; isClean(cwd) checks git status --porcelain; hasConflicts(feature, phase) dry-run merge check.

tasks.title: Create context compiler
tasks.description: Create src/server/context.ts with: compileContext(featureDir, phaseId) reads .agent/rules/*.md, spec.md, plan.md, .gwrk/tasks.json (filtered to phase), gate scripts, and concatenates into single Markdown; writeContextToSandbox(containerId, context) writes to /workspace/.gwrk/phase-context.md via docker exec.

tasks.title: Unit tests for Phase 3
tasks.description: Create src/server/git-manager.test.ts: verify branch creation, merge-back, conflict detection, dirty tree rejection. Mock child_process. Create src/server/context.test.ts: verify compiled context contains rules, spec, plan, tasks sections. Mock fs reads.

tasks.title: Add dockerode dependency
tasks.description: Add 'dockerode' to dependencies and '@types/dockerode' to devDependencies in package.json. Run pnpm install.

tasks.title: Create sandbox Dockerfile
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile.sandbox based on debian:bookworm-slim. Install Node.js LTS, Git, gh CLI. Set WORKDIR /workspace. Label as gwrk-sandbox.

tasks.title: Create Docker sandbox manager
tasks.description: Create src/server/sandbox.ts with: createSandbox(opts: SandboxOptions) creates container from gwrk-sandbox:bookworm-slim, bind mounts repoPath:/workspace:rw, sets labels gwrk.feature/gwrk.phase/gwrk.backend, starts container; destroySandbox(containerId) stops and removes; destroyAllSandboxes() lists gwrk.* containers and destroys all; listSandboxes() returns SandboxInfo[].

tasks.title: Unit tests for Phase 4
tasks.description: Create src/server/sandbox.test.ts: verify createSandbox sets correct labels, mounts at /workspace, uses correct image; verify destroySandbox stops and removes; verify destroyAllSandboxes; verify listSandboxes. Mock dockerode.

tasks.title: Create JSONL persistence writer
tasks.description: Create src/server/persistence.ts with persistDispatch(record: DispatchRecord) that appends JSON line to .gwrk/dispatches.jsonl. Creates file if missing. Zod-validates record before writing.

tasks.title: Create DispatchQueue class
tasks.description: Create src/server/dispatch.ts with class DispatchQueue: constructor(deps: DispatchDeps), enqueue(request) creates DispatchRecord with status queued and triggers processNext(), processNext() dequeues if under maxClones and not throttled, handleCompletion() retries 3x on same backend then escalates via fallbackOrder, getQueue() returns active/queued/throttled, getDispatch() returns record by feature+phase.

tasks.title: Create dispatch API routes
tasks.description: Create src/server/routes/dispatch.ts with: POST /api/dispatch (accepts {featureId, phaseId, backend}, calls queue.enqueue), GET /api/dispatch/:feature/:phase (calls queue.getDispatch), GET /api/dispatch/queue (calls queue.getQueue).

tasks.title: Wire dispatch routes and monitor into server
tasks.description: In src/server/index.ts, register dispatch routes, instantiate DispatchQueue with sandbox/gitManager/context/monitor deps, wire monitor.startPolling() to server startup and monitor.stopPolling() to shutdown.

tasks.title: Unit tests for dispatch queue
tasks.description: Create src/server/dispatch.test.ts: verify FIFO ordering, maxClones throttle, 3x retry on same backend + escalation to fallbackOrder, attempt recording with timestamps/exit codes/stderr. Mock sandbox/gitManager/monitor.

tasks.title: Unit tests for dispatch routes
tasks.description: Create src/server/routes/dispatch.test.ts: verify POST /api/dispatch returns 200 with dispatch record, GET queue returns correct shape, GET by feature/phase returns record or 404.

tasks.title: Integration test for end-to-end dispatch
tasks.description: Create src/server/integration.test.ts: start daemon in subprocess, POST /api/dispatch, verify container created with correct labels, verify dispatch record in dispatches.jsonl, stop daemon, verify cleanup.
